title: SFX for Gray's Villager Overhaul
description: Adds animal-like Villager Voices for Gray's Villagers
body:
# Villager Voices for Gray's Villager Overhaul
I found the Villager sounds jarring with the furry villagers.

Original mod at: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grays-villager-overhaul by CanineGray
The SFX was made by AI for lack of better stuff

If you want to suggest better sound effects contact <borzoi@disroot.org>

## License
You're explicitly allowed to use this mod or its sound effects for whatever you want. No creditation is needed.

The icon contains a model from CanineGray's original mod. They did not endorse this mod or that picture.
